profile.bio: Marketplace-operated provider account for Fast-hosted data services.

service.name: G2 Product Reviews Scraper
service.tagline: Collect software product reviews from G2 through a Fast-native async proxy.
service.about: G2 Product Reviews Scraper exposes an Apify-backed review extraction workflow through the marketplace for voice-of-customer analysis, competitive product research, and review summarization from G2 product slugs.
service.promptIntro: I want to use the G2 Product Reviews Scraper service on Fast Marketplace.
setupInstructions: Fund a Fast wallet on mainnet.
Provide the G2 product slug and the maximum number of reviews to fetch.
Keep the returned job token and poll the marketplace job route for completion.

endpoints.title: Product Reviews
endpoints.description: Collect G2 review content, ratings, and reviewer metadata for a software product slug.
endpoints.usageNotes: Use product slugs from G2 when you want review text and rating signals for customer feedback or competitor analysis.
